hooks.command: input=$(cat); sid=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // empty'); f=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -n "$f" ] && [ -n "$sid" ] && [ -e "$f" ] && case "$f" in *.png|*.jpg|*.jpeg|*.gif|*.webp|*.pdf|*.svg|*.md|*.txt|*.html|*.docx|*.env|*/.env|*/.env.*|*/.*/*) echo "$f" >> "/tmp/claude-pending-opens-$sid.txt" ;; esac 2>/dev/null || true

sid=$(jq -r '.session_id // empty'); f="/tmp/claude-pending-opens-$sid.txt"; [ -n "$sid" ] && [ -f "$f" ] && awk '!seen[$0]++' "$f" | while read -r p; do [ -e "$p" ] && open "$p"; done; rm -f "$f" 2>/dev/null || true
